title: Imperial IDE operational usability station, agent roster, live task registration, and workflow control on PC
mission_summary: Transform the current Imperial IDE foundation into an operational UI/UX-friendly station. The Owner must be able to write tasks inside IDE, build taskpacks, register tasks through a gated local Astronomicon path, view launch cards, view all agents and organ servitors, track lifecycle state, inspect reports and receipts, and keep dangerous execution gated.

strategic_intent.kernel: Imperium New Reality remains the script-first AI MetaOS kernel.
strategic_intent.station: Imperial IDE becomes the Owner's operational usability station, not just a dashboard.
strategic_intent.ui_ux: Workbench GUI and the existing Workbench TUI become the primary user surfaces.
strategic_intent.tasks: The Owner can create, build, register, inspect, and hand off tasks from inside the station.
strategic_intent.agents: All organ agents are visible as servitor roles; Servitor Prime is the LLM servitor, organ servitors represent organ-owned operational workers.
strategic_intent.truth: The station always shows honest state: live, dry-run, blocked, candidate, warning, failed, or unknown.

organ_route.DOCTRINARIUM: station doctrine, agent taxonomy, no-overclaim boundaries
organ_route.OFFICIO_AGENTIS: owner-facing Russian guide, UI wording, launch cards
organ_route.ASTRONOMICON: live local task registration gate, launch cards, task registry, current task state
organ_route.ADMINISTRATUM: receipts, task lifecycle ledger, report browser, bundle gates, continuity, push closure
organ_route.MECHANICUS: tool validation, taskpack validation, command policy, dry-run and future real-exec gates
organ_route.INQUISITION: safety center, fake-green block, unsafe execution block, warning downgrade
organ_route.STRATEGIUM: workflow prioritization, station menu design, next execution ladder
organ_route.SCHOLA_IMPERIALIS: runbooks, templates, operator training, reusable task workflows

cyrillic_in_taskpack.scope: MANIFEST.json, TASK_SPEC.md, ACCEPTANCE_GATES.md, OUTPUT_REQUIREMENTS.md, TASK_ROUTE_MANIFEST_TEMPLATE.json, TASK_START_ACK_TEMPLATE.json, BLUEPRINTS/*.md

localization_exception.scope: owner-facing runtime files only after Officio role entry
localization_exception.forbidden_scope: taskpack internal root files and BLUEPRINTS

allowed_when: created or modified Python files compile
Workbench TUI operational station smoke passes or exact blocker is recorded
Workbench GUI structural smoke passes or exact blocker is recorded
safe local Astronomicon registration gate smoke uses a station-generated smoke task only
no secret files or local operator configs are staged
forbidden_push_cases: failed validation without explicit BLOCK verdict
destructive cleanup or delete without owner batch approval
live LLM backend enabled with secrets

owner_decisions_not_approved_for_this_ta.OD_REAL_SERVITOR_EXECUTION: not approved except safe handoff cards

primary_outputs: Unified operational station layer under ORGANS/IMPERIAL_IDE/STATION
Workbench TUI upgraded into primary operational TUI with OPS and agent views
Workbench GUI upgraded with operational task and agent panels
Astronomicon-compatible taskpack builder usable from GUI/TUI/CLI
Safe live local Astronomicon registration gate for generated taskpacks
Launch Card and Servitor Prime handoff UI
Task lifecycle tracker and honest state model
Reports, receipts, safety, and git closure UI
Operator runbook and Russian user guide
Validation, smoke, commit, and push receipts
